headline: Oracle’s (ORCL) Backlog Drives Its Bull Thesis According To Analysts
summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) is one of the 10 High Growth Mega Cap Stocks to Buy and Hold for Next 10 Years. headline: Assessing Veritone (VERI) Valuation After Oracle Cloud Deal And AI Privacy Platform Updates
summary: Veritone (VERI) has drawn fresh attention after a multi year agreement with Oracle to migrate its AI solutions to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, along with updates to its privacy focused Redact and Data Refinery platforms. See our latest analysis for Veritone. The latest client agreement with Oracle and the earlier updates to Redact and Data Refinery come against a weak share price backdrop, with a 90 day share price return of 63.42% decline and a 5 year total shareholder return of 92.5%...

headline: Oracle’s Veritone AI Deal And Nashville Growth Add Context To Valuation
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has signed a multi year agreement for Veritone to run its AI solutions on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. The company is also expanding its physical presence in Nashville with a new long term lease and plans for additional tech roles. These moves highlight growing enterprise AI workloads on Oracle Cloud and increased investment in on the ground operations. Oracle, trading at $139.66, has seen mixed share performance, with a 6.7% decline over the past week and a 5.6% decline...
